# Audit Evidence Package (DRAFT) — ACME Manufacturing Inc. (de-identified)

> Draft evidence support only; this package does not conclude on control operating effectiveness, does not issue or imply an audit opinion, and is not a management representation. Every testing conclusion, opinion, and attestation is reserved to the auditor, control owner, or authorized signer, and delivery to the auditor is a separate, human-authorized action.

## 1. Audit Engagement Scope and Metadata
- Entity: ACME Manufacturing Inc. (de-identified)
- Engagement: FY2026 SOX ITGC & Financial-Close Controls (Internal audit / SOX walkthrough - draft evidence support)
- Framework/standard: COSO 2013 / SOX 404
- Audit period: 2026-01-01 to 2026-06-30
- As-of date: 2026-07-17
- Config version: audit-evidence-2026.07
- Scope of this package: assemble, index, redact, and quality-check requested evidence for auditor review; it does not test controls or conclude.

## 2. Evidence Request Register (PBC Log)
| Request | Title | Control | Readiness | Artifacts |
| ------- | ----- | ------- | --------- | --------- |
| PBC-01 | Operating-account bank reconciliation, Q2 | FCR-CASH-02 | packaged-complete | ART-01 |
| PBC-02 | Payroll register sample with PII redacted | FCR-PAY-04 | packaged-complete | ART-02 |
| PBC-03 | Revenue cutoff sales-order support | FCR-REV-01 | evidence-gap | ART-03 |
| PBC-04 | New-hire access provisioning evidence | ITGC-ACC-01 | redaction-required | ART-04 |
| PBC-05 | Privileged-access periodic review | ITGC-ACC-03 | custody-gap | ART-05 |
| PBC-06 | Manual journal-entry approval evidence | FCR-JE-02 | evidence-stale | ART-06 |
| PBC-07 | Inventory count sheets support | FCR-INV-01 | needs-data | - |
| PBC-08 | SoD conflict remediation - not applicable this period | ITGC-SOD-02 | not-applicable | ART-08 |

## 3. Request-to-Artifact-to-Evidence Mapping
`Readiness` is one of packaged-complete, evidence-gap, evidence-stale, redaction-required, custody-gap, needs-data, not-applicable — never a testing conclusion.

| Request | Evidence refs | Readiness | Redaction | Reason |
| ------- | ------------- | --------- | --------- | ------ |
| PBC-01 | ART-01 | packaged-complete | not-required | Each mapped artifact is in-period, custody-preserved, and redaction-resolved |
| PBC-02 | ART-02 | packaged-complete | resolved | Each mapped artifact is in-period, custody-preserved, and redaction-resolved |
| PBC-03 | - | evidence-gap | not-required | Referenced artifact(s) not found in evidence repository: ART-03 |
| PBC-04 | ART-04 | redaction-required | unresolved | Sensitive fields flagged but not redacted on artifact(s): ART-04 |
| PBC-05 | - | custody-gap | not-required | Chain of custody incomplete on artifact(s): ART-05 |
| PBC-06 | ART-06 | evidence-stale | not-required | Artifact(s) do not cover the requested period (out-of-period or superseded): ART-06 |
| PBC-07 | - | needs-data | not-required | Request is not mapped to any evidence artifact |
| PBC-08 | - | not-applicable | not-required | Marked N/A with documented justification: No provisioning changes to conflicting roles in scope this period; documented in memo SOD-NA-2026 (ART-08) |

## 4. Packaging Readiness Summary
- Total requests assessed: 8
- packaged-complete: 2
- evidence-gap: 1
- evidence-stale: 1
- redaction-required: 1
- custody-gap: 1
- needs-data: 1
- not-applicable: 1
- NOTE: counts describe packaging readiness only and are NOT a control-effectiveness conclusion.
